title: knowledge-hint-broad.cjs: add underseed import-recommendation branch + drop sentinel + clean fabric-import SKILL.md
description: Replace the retired sentinel-based first-time `/fabric-import` recommendation with a self-checking SessionStart branch in knowledge-hint-broad.cjs. When the project has agents.meta.json but canonical knowledge node count is below underseed_node_threshold AND no in-flight or completed import is recorded in .fabric/.import-state.json, append a banner recommending /fabric-import. Critically, this banner must NOT be fully suppressed by the existing revision_hash gate (otherwise an unchanged knowledge graph hides the recommendation forever). Also dismantle the sentinel branch in this same hook (isImportRequestedSentinelPresent + main() short-circuit + related exports) and clean stale 'sentinel' references from packages/cli/templates/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md (Phase 0 'Sentinel Contract (rc.7 T1)' block + Phase 3.4 'sentinel clear' step), adding one short note that the mechanism is retired in favour of the SessionStart underseed self-check.

criteria: shouldRecommendImport(cwd) helper exists in knowledge-hint-broad.cjs and returns true iff (a) .fabric/agents.meta.json exists, (b) canonical knowledge-node count < underseed_node_threshold (default 10, read from .fabric/fabric-config.json with default fallback), and (c) .fabric/.import-state.json is missing OR its phase !== 'complete' AND its phase !== an in-progress phase that signals user is mid-import (i.e. import not yet started == recommend; import in progress == do NOT recommend; import complete == do NOT recommend)

main() integrates the helper: when shouldRecommendImport returns true, the hook output includes a clearly visible banner line such as '📋 Fabric: 知识库稀疏，是否调 /fabric-import 从 git 历史与现有文档回灌知识?' (exact wording may vary; must be a single appended line in the existing broad-injection output stream)

revision_hash gate is bypassed for the import-recommendation banner: when shouldRecommendImport==true, the hook always emits at least the banner line even if the broad-summary content is unchanged; the broad-summary body itself may still be hash-gated as today

All sentinel surface is removed from knowledge-hint-broad.cjs: no isImportRequestedSentinelPresent helper, no sentinel constant, no sentinelPresent main() short-circuit, no sentinel-related banner, no sentinel exports

fabric-import SKILL.md: Phase 0 'Sentinel Contract (rc.7 T1)' block is deleted; Phase 3.4 'rc.7 T1 sentinel clear' step is deleted; one new short note (1-3 lines) explains that the .fabric/.import-requested mechanism is retired and recommendation now comes from the SessionStart underseed self-check
Updated test file packages/cli/__tests__/knowledge-hint-broad.test.ts adds the 5 listed cases and removes all sentinel-specific tests; all other pre-existing tests pass unchanged
Hook contract surface (main() return shape) remains compatible with SessionStart consumer; no new mandatory fields
convergence.definition_of_done: After a fresh `fabric init` on a sparse-knowledge repo, the very next SessionStart shows the /fabric-import recommendation banner deterministically; sentinel mechanism is fully gone from this hook and from SKILL.md.

files.target: shouldRecommendImport helper + main() integration + sentinel removal
files.change: Add shouldRecommendImport(cwd) helper (3-condition truth table). In main(), after current broad-injection lines are assembled, call shouldRecommendImport(cwd); if true, append banner line and ensure emit-path runs even when revision_hash is unchanged. Remove isImportRequestedSentinelPresent, sentinel constants, sentinelPresent main() branch, sentinel banners, and sentinel exports.

files.target: Phase 0 'Sentinel Contract (rc.7 T1)' block + Phase 3.4 'sentinel clear' step
files.change: Delete the Phase 0 sentinel block and the Phase 3.4 sentinel-clear step; add a 1-3 line note explaining the mechanism is retired and SessionStart underseed self-check now drives recommendation.

files.target: test suites for underseed branch + sentinel removal
files.change: Add 5 new test cases listed below; delete all sentinel-related cases; ensure baseline broad-summary tests stay unchanged.

implementation: 1. Read packages/cli/templates/hooks/knowledge-hint-broad.cjs end-to-end. Map: (a) where broad-injection lines are assembled, (b) revision_hash gate location, (c) all sentinel-related identifiers and code blocks.

2. Decide on helper-sharing strategy: this hook cannot require fabric-hint.cjs (separate template files). Default to copying the equivalent logic for countCanonicalNodes and readUnderseedThreshold inline (matches current convention of independent hooks). Re-evaluate only if more than one helper would need duplication; in that case add packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/ shared module — but document the decision in the PR description either way.

3. Implement countCanonicalNodes(cwd) and readUnderseedThreshold(cwd) inline (mirrors fabric-hint.cjs lines ~681 / ~746). Implement isImportTouched(cwd) reading .fabric/.import-state.json: returns 'absent' | 'in_progress' | 'complete' | 'error' (defensive parse).

4. Implement shouldRecommendImport(cwd): return true iff agents.meta.json exists AND countCanonicalNodes < threshold AND isImportTouched === 'absent'. (Both 'in_progress' and 'complete' return false — user is either currently importing or has already done it.)

5. Modify main() emit logic: after the existing `lines` array is built and before the revision_hash gate decides to emit/suppress, check shouldRecommendImport. If true, push the banner line into `lines` AND set a flag that bypasses the hash gate so the import banner is always shown when applicable. Be careful to preserve the existing broad-summary hash gate for the rest of the body — only the banner line must be guaranteed.
6. Delete sentinel constants, isImportRequestedSentinelPresent, the sentinelPresent main() short-circuit, any sentinel-keyed banner, and sentinel exports.

7. Edit packages/cli/templates/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md: delete Phase 0 'Sentinel Contract (rc.7 T1)' block (locate by section header), delete the Phase 3.4 'rc.7 T1 sentinel clear' step. Add a short note in a sensible location (e.g. end of the recommendations/triggers section): '过去版本的 .fabric/.import-requested sentinel 机制已下线；推荐由 SessionStart hook 的 underseed 自检触发 (knowledge-hint-broad)'.

8. Update packages/cli/__tests__/knowledge-hint-broad.test.ts: add 5 cases (canonical=3 < 10 + no import-state → emit; canonical=15 ≥ 10 → no emit; phase=complete → no emit; phase=1 in progress → no emit; revision_hash unchanged but should-recommend → still emit). Remove all sentinel-specific tests.
9. Run `pnpm --filter @fabric/cli test -- knowledge-hint-broad` and confirm the suite passes.

manual_checks: fabric init in fresh tmp dir → trigger SessionStart → confirm banner appears even though knowledge graph hash is unchanged
Run /fabric-import to completion → next SessionStart → confirm banner does NOT appear
Mid-import (state.json phase=1) → trigger SessionStart → confirm banner does NOT appear (avoids self-recommendation)
success_metrics: Banner deterministically appears on first SessionStart of a sparse-knowledge fresh init (was: probabilistic, depended on sentinel write)
Zero references to sentinel identifiers remain in knowledge-hint-broad.cjs (grep IMPORT_REQUESTED_SENTINEL_FILE returns 0)
SKILL.md sentinel sections fully removed (grep -i 'sentinel' returns only the new retirement note)

regression: Existing broad-summary emission logic for the non-import case is unchanged (hash gate still controls broad-summary body)
All non-sentinel tests in knowledge-hint-broad.test.ts pass unchanged
fabric-import skill behaviour itself is unaffected (only documentation cleanup; no skill logic touched)

reference.pattern: Read-only state probes with defensive parse + always-emit override for high-priority hints
reference.examples: Mirror countCanonicalNodes / readUnderseedThreshold style from fabric-hint.cjs (~lines 681 and 746) and the existing emit/suppress flow already present in knowledge-hint-broad.cjs.

rationale.chosen_approach: Self-checking SessionStart hook removes the entire surface area of sentinel-write race conditions (CI / -y / piped input / TTY-detection failures all bypassed sentinel write previously). The check has zero per-session cost (a few file stats) and is deterministic.
alternatives_considered: Lower the Stop-hook Signal C TTL from 24h to e.g. 1h — rejected: still misses same-day, same-session first SessionStart, and silently re-introduces racy behaviour
Have init.ts always write the sentinel regardless of TTY — rejected: design lock prefers retiring the sentinel mechanism entirely (clean-slate)
Embed the recommendation in a different hook (e.g. SessionStart-narrow) — rejected: knowledge-hint-broad is the canonical broad-context hook and already runs every SessionStart
decision_factors: Determinism (no race with non-interactive init paths)
Low complexity (3-condition pure check on existing artifacts)
Coordinated retirement of sentinel mechanism across whole codebase
Always-emit-banner override solves the revision_hash gate edge case
rationale.tradeoffs: Banner re-emits on every SessionStart until import completes or threshold is met. Acceptable: the banner is a one-line hint and the user can run /fabric-import immediately to dismiss it permanently.

risks.description: Bypassing revision_hash gate for the import banner accidentally bypasses it for the rest of the broad summary too
risks.mitigation: Implement the bypass as a per-line emit decision (banner always; broad summary still hash-gated). Verify by a unit test that asserts broad-summary body is NOT re-emitted on unchanged hash even when banner is emitted
risks.fallback: If clean separation is too invasive, accept a single redundant emit per SessionStart on sparse-knowledge repos until import is done — still better than missing the recommendation

risks.description: agents.meta.json existence check could be true on a freshly-init'd repo before any knowledge import — banner shows even though there's literally nothing yet to dedupe
risks.mitigation: This is the desired behaviour: sparse-knowledge fresh repo SHOULD show the recommendation. The 'just init'd' case is exactly the target use case.

risks.description: Helper duplication (countCanonicalNodes, readUnderseedThreshold copied between fabric-hint.cjs and knowledge-hint-broad.cjs) drifts over time
risks.mitigation: Add a code comment in both files cross-referencing each other; if a third hook needs the same logic, refactor into packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/ at that point
risks.fallback: Accept short-term duplication (matches existing convention of independent hooks)

key_functions.purpose: Three-condition gate: agents.meta.json exists, canonical < threshold, .import-state.json absent
key_functions.returns: boolean — true means emit banner this SessionStart

key_functions.purpose: Inline equivalent of fabric-hint.cjs countCanonicalNodes — defensive read of canonical knowledge directory
key_functions.returns: number of canonical entries (0 on any error)

key_functions.purpose: Read underseed_node_threshold from fabric-config.json with default fallback (10)

commit.message_template: feat(hooks): add underseed import-recommendation in knowledge-hint-broad + drop sentinel
